_comment: v4rian dev required status checks. Names the audits and tests emitted by .github/workflows/ci-dispatch.yml on the pr-open trigger as required for any PR merge to dev. The contexts match the required.*.sh basenames (minus .sh) under .io.v4rian.how-git/ci/{tests,audits}/pr-open/. Applied via .io.v4rian.how-git/scripts/apply-repo-rules.sh, which folds these contexts into the dev branch protection rule. The check names MUST match the matrix job 'name:' fields in ci-dispatch.yml verbatim; GitHub matches required checks by exact string.
name: v4rian-dev-required-checks
